personalInfo.personalStatement: Internationally recognized robotics researcher with expertise in human-robot interaction, soft robotics, and bio-inspired robotic systems. Over 15 years of research experience with 110+ peer-reviewed publications in top-tier venues including Science Robotics, IEEE Transactions, and major robotics conferences. Multiple best paper awards and patents for novel robotic mechanisms and control algorithms. Strong track record of translating fundamental research into practical applications with several successful technology transfers to industry. Committed to advancing robotics education and fostering next generation of robotics researchers.

Editorial Boards:

- Associate Editor, Soft Robotics (2019-Present)

Conference Organization:
- Program Chair, IEEE International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) 2025
- Area Chair, IEEE ICRA (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
- Area Chair, IEEE/RSJ IROS (2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024)
- Co-organizer, RSS Workshop on Soft Robotics (2019, 2021, 2023)

Professional Leadership:
- Vice President, Korean Robotics Society (2022-2024)
- Member, IEEE RAS Technical Committee on Soft Robotics (2017-Present)
- Member, IEEE RAS Technical Committee on Human-Robot Interaction (2015-Present)

Peer Review:
Active reviewer for 30+ journals and conferences including Science Robotics, Nature
Communications, IEEE Transactions (Robotics, Automation Science & Engineering), International
Journal of Robotics Research, and all major robotics conferences. 200+ reviews completed.

Over 60 invited talks at universities and research institutions worldwide (2011-2024)
Recent keynotes:
- Keynote Speaker, International Conference on Soft Robotics (2024)
- Plenary Talk, IEEE/RSJ IROS (2023)
- Keynote, Asian Conference on Robotics and Automation (2022)
- Distinguished Lecture, IEEE Robotics & Automation Society (2021)
- Invited seminars at: MIT, Stanford, CMU, UC Berkeley, ETH Zurich, Max Planck Institute,
University of Tokyo, National University of Singapore (2019-2024)

- Co-founder and Technical Advisor, SoftRobot Inc. (startup commercializing soft gripper
technology) - 2020
- Technology licensing agreements with Samsung, Hyundai, and LG for robotic technologies
developed in lab
- Consultant for multiple robotics companies in Korea and internationally

Over 90 papers published at major robotics conferences including:
- IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) - 25+ papers
- IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) - 28+ papers
- Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) - 12 papers
- ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) - 15+ papers
- International Conference on Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) - 10+ papers

RESEARCH GRANTS
As Principal Investigator:

Generation Soft Robots for Human-Centric Applications" (2023-2028) - KRW 1,200,000,000 (~$900,000)
- Samsung Research Funding: "AI-Powered Collaborative Robots for Manufacturing" (2022-
2025) - KRW 800,000,000 (~$600,000)
- Ministry of Science and ICT - Leading Research Center Program: "Center for Intelligent Soft
Robotics" (2020-2027) - KRW 3,500,000,000 (~$2.6M) (Director of Center)
- Hyundai Motor Company: "Soft Robotic Systems for Vehicle Manufacturing" (2021-2024) - KRW
600,000,000
- NRF - Global Research Laboratory Program (2018-2024) - KRW 2,000,000,000 (~$1.5M)
- NRF - Basic Science Research Program (2016-2021) - KRW 400,000,000
- KAIST High-Risk High-Return Project (2015-2018) - KRW 300,000,000

As Co-Investigator:
- Multiple collaborative grants with Korean and international partners totaling ~$2M additional
funding
